Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*********************************************************************

 Cartesian 1-cells

 In this file, we show that if we have 2 cartesian 1-cells over some
 1-cell, then we have an adjoint equivalence between their domains.

 *********************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Opposite.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.TransportLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispPseudofunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.StrictPseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.StrictPseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.StrictToPseudo.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Projection.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.CleavingOfBicat.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp.

Section AdjEquivBetweenCartesian.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {D : disp_bicat B}
          (HB_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B).

  Section MapAndCellFromCartesians.
    Context {x y : B}
            {f : x --> y}
            {xx₁ xx₂ : D x}
            {yy : D y}
            (ff₁ : xx₁ -->[ f ] yy)
            {ff₂ : xx₂ -->[ f ] yy}
            (Hff₂ : cartesian_1cell D ff₂).

    Let ff' : xx₁ -->[ id₁ x · f ] yy
      := transport_along_inv_2cell
           HB_2_1
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           ff₁.
    Let ℓ : lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ ff'
      := pr1 Hff₂ x xx₁ (id₁ _) ff'.

    Definition map_between_cartesian_1cell
      : xx₁ -->[ id₁ _ ] xx₂
      := ℓ.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
ff':= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₁: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
ℓ:= pr1 Hff₂ x xx₁ (id₁ x) ff': lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ ff'
disp_invertible_2cell (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
  (map_between_cartesian_1cell ;; ff₂) ff₁

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
ff':= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₁: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
ℓ:= pr1 Hff₂ x xx₁ (id₁ x) ff': lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ ff'
disp_invertible_2cell (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
  (map_between_cartesian_1cell ;; ff₂) ff₁

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
ff':= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₁: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
ℓ:= pr1 Hff₂ x xx₁ (id₁ x) ff': lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ ff'
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) =
lunitor_invertible_2cell f

      abstract
        (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
         cbn ;
         apply id2_left).
    Defined.
  End MapAndCellFromCartesians.

  Section InverseOfCartesians.
    Context {x y : B}
            {f : x --> y}
            {xx₁ xx₂ : D x}
            {yy : D y}
            {ff₁ : xx₁ -->[ f ] yy}
            (Hff₁ : cartesian_1cell D ff₁)
            {ff₂ : xx₂ -->[ f ] yy}
            (Hff₂ : cartesian_1cell D ff₂).

    Let l : xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
      := map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂.

    Let δl : disp_invertible_2cell
               (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
               (l ;; ff₂)
               ff₁
      := map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂.

    Let r : xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
      := map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁.

    Let δr : disp_invertible_2cell
               (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
               (r ;; ff₁)
               ff₂
      := map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁.

    Let gg₁ : xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f ] yy
      := transport_along_inv_2cell
           HB_2_1
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           ff₂.

    Let γ₁ : disp_invertible_2cell
               (inv_of_invertible_2cell (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
               gg₁
               ff₂
      := transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
           HB_2_1
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           ff₂.

    Let gg₂ : xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f ] yy
      := transport_along_inv_2cell
           HB_2_1
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))
           ff₂.

    Let γ₂ : disp_invertible_2cell _ gg₂ ff₂
      := transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
           HB_2_1
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))
           ff₂.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
comp_of_invertible_2cell (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))) =
id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
comp_of_invertible_2cell (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))) =
id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) =
pr1 (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
x0: id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)

        apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) =
pr1 (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id₂ (id₁ x · f)

      apply lunitor_linvunitor.
    Qed.

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
  (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁

      exact (transportf
               (λ z, disp_invertible_2cell z _ _)
               first_lift_path
               (vcomp_disp_invertible
                  (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor _)
                  (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f)))))) =
id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) 
                       (id₁ x) f))))))) =
pr1 (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))

D: disp_bicat B

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
x0: id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)

        apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.

D: disp_bicat B

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell

  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x · f)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))))) =
pr1 (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
• ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
   • (lunitor f
      • ((linvunitor f • linvunitor (id₁ x · f))
         • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) =
id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
• ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
   • (lunitor f
      • ((linvunitor f • linvunitor (id₁ x · f))
         • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) = ?b

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell

  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
?b = id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

B: bicat

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
lunitor f
• ((linvunitor f • linvunitor (id₁ x · f))
   • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f) = ?t2

  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
((lunitor f • linvunitor f) • linvunitor (id₁ x · f))
• lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
• ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
   • (linvunitor (id₁ x · f)
      • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) =
id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy

δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
((rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f • (id₁ x ◃ lunitor f))
 • linvunitor (id₁ x · f))
• lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f =
id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

• lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f =
id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
(runitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
• (((linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
    • rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)
   • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f) =
id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
(runitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
• ((linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
      • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) =
id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
(runitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
• ((linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) =
id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  HB_2_1

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f = id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)

      apply id2_rwhisker.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ gg₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
  (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂

      exact (transportf
               (λ z, disp_invertible_2cell z _ _)
               second_lift_path
               (vcomp_disp_invertible
                  (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator _ _ _)
                  (vcomp_disp_invertible
                     (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
                     (vcomp_disp_invertible
                        δr
                        (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
gg₂ ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f] gg₁

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
inv_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
• (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1 =
lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite lunitor_linvunitor ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite <- lunitor_triangle ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
         apply id2_left).
    Defined.

    Let w₁ : lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift first_lift
      := pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ _ _ _ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁ second_lift first_lift.

    Definition disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv
      : r ;; l ==>[ lunitor _ ] id_disp _
      := w₁.

    Let ζ : r ;; l ==>[ lunitor _ ] id_disp _
      := disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv.

D: disp_bicat B

xx₁, xx₂: D x

δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
gg₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f] gg₂

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
inv_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
• (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           f))) ^-1 = linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite lunitor_linvunitor ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite rwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite lunitor_V_id_is_left_unit_V_id ;
         rewrite <- triangle_l_inv ;
         rewrite <- lwhisker_hcomp ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite linvunitor_assoc ;
         rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite triangle_r_inv ;
         rewrite <- rwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite lunitor_V_id_is_left_unit_V_id ;
         apply idpath).
    Defined.

    Let w₂ : lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift second_lift
      := pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ _ _ _ gg₂ (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift second_lift.

    Definition inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv
      : id_disp _ ==>[ linvunitor _ ] r ;; l
      := w₂.

    Let ξ : id_disp _ ==>[ linvunitor _ ] r ;; l
      := inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv.

    Local Definition help_inv_cell₁
      : gg₂ ==>[ id₂ _ ▹ f ] gg₂
      := transportb
           (λ z, _ ==>[ z ] _)
           (id2_rwhisker _ _)
           (disp_id2 _).

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
ζ •• ξ =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
   r ;; l ==>[ z] r ;; l)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))
  (disp_id2 (r ;; l))

        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1

              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift

  first_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift

transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
   r ;; l ==>[ z] r ;; l) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))

     (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy

ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₂)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
       r ;; l ==>[ z] r ;; l)
      (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x)) (ζ •• ξ) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₂)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
       r ;; l ==>[ z] r ;; l)
      (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))
      (transportb
         (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
          r ;; l ==>[ z] r ;; l)
         (vcomp_rinv
            (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))
         (disp_id2 (r ;; l))) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift

  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,

   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))

  HB_2_1

  first_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift

ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₂)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
        (maponpaths
           (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
            x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))))
     (((ζ •• ξ) ▹▹ ff₂)
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift)) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift

  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  HB_2_1

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁

transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,

  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,

     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @

   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy

ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] r ;; l ;; ff₂)
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
     ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ξ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] r ;; l ;; ff₂)
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
     ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ξ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
        (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
     (((ζ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ξ ▹▹ ff₂))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift)) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift

transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,

        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @

     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,

        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
