ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
        (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
        (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)))
     ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
      •• ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
          •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂
               second_lift))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        (lassociator_invertible_2cell

  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift

ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift

ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
          (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
          (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)))
     ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
      •• ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
          •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂
               second_lift))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
  (! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
       •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂
            second_lift)) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift

transportf
  (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
  (! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @

     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,

        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @

   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))

   •• ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)

(ξ ▹▹ ff₂)

?t2

          exact (eq_lift_2cell_alt _ _ w₂).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift

w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift

  (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
  (! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,

        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• transportb
        (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₂)
        (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
         •• help_cell₂)) =

•• help_inv_cell₁

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

  HB_2_1

ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
            id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
           help_cell₂_subproof))
     ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
      •• (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
          •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy

ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy

δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
       •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
       •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂))) = ?b
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
?b =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
       •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂))) = ?b

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
(ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
•• (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
    •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  first_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
 •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift)
•• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift

(ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
•• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift = 
?y'

          exact (eq_lift_2cell_alt _ _ w₁).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
        (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (transportb
        (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
        (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
         •• help_cell₁) •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
          (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (transportf
        (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
        (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
            ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)))
        (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
         •• help_cell₁) •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
          (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
            h
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
           (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
               ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))))
        ((disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂
            second_lift •• help_cell₁)
         •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
    •• help_cell₁) •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
    •• transportf
         (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
          gg₂ ==>[ z] gg₁) help_cell₁_subproof
         (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))
   •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₁_subproof)
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
      •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))
   •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x · f)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
            id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
            • h) help_cell₁_subproof))
     ((disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
       •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))
      •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₁_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
    •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))
   •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
