  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₁_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (vassocl
        (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
      •• transportb
           (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                  id₁ x · id₁ x · f, gg₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
           (vassocl
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x · f)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)))
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
           (γ₂
            •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁
                •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂))))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₁_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (! vassocl
          (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
      •• transportf
           (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                  id₁ x · id₁ x · f, gg₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
           (! vassocl
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            f)
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x · f)))
                      (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)))
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                ^-1
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
           (γ₂
            •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁
                •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂))))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₁_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (! vassocl
          (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                  id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
            id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
            • h)
           (! vassocl
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            f)
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x · f)))
                      (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)))
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                ^-1
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)))
        (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
         •• (γ₂
             •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁
                 •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! vassocl
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₁_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
   •• (γ₂
       •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁
           •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! vassocl
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₁_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
   •• (γ₂
       •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁
           •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))) = ?b
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
?b =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
•• help_inv_cell₁

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! vassocl
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₁_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (lunitor (id₁ x))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
   •• (γ₂
       •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁
           •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))) = ?b

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
disp_inv_cell γ₁ •• (γ₁ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂) = ?t2

  first_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift

(disp_inv_cell γ₁ •• γ₁) •• disp_inv_cell γ₂ = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)

gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell

              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff₂ ==>[ α] ff₂)
  (vcomp_linv
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))
  (disp_id2 ff₂) •• disp_inv_cell γ₂ = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B

x, y: B

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell

γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf (λ α : f ==> f, ff₂ ==>[ α] ff₂)
  (! vcomp_linv
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))
  (disp_id2 ff₂) •• disp_inv_cell γ₂ = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
     (! vcomp_linv
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))))
  (disp_id2 ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
     (! vcomp_linv
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (id2_left
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) (disp_inv_cell γ₂)) =
?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
     (! vcomp_linv
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))))
  (transportf
     (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (! id2_left
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
     (disp_inv_cell γ₂)) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
  (! id2_left
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))) ^-1 @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
     (! vcomp_linv
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))))
  (disp_inv_cell γ₂) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! vassocl
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
