δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_rinv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] r ;; l ;; ff₂)
     (id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f)
     (disp_id2 (r ;; l ;; ff₂))
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
   •• disp_id2 gg₂)

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁

  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_rinv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (id2_left
        (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)))
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (id2_right
        (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)))
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_rinv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (! id2_left
          (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)))
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (! id2_right
          (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)))
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
  (! id2_left
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_rinv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x,
         x0 ▹ f) (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift) =
transportf
  (λ α : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
  (! id2_right
       (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
! id2_left (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
  (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
  (maponpaths
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
     (! vcomp_rinv
          (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
  (maponpaths
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x ==> id₁ x · id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
     (lunitor_linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) @
! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) ▹ f) =
! id2_right (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) • h)
  (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x · id₁ x) f)

        apply cellset_property.
    Qed.

    Local Definition help_inv_cell₂
      : gg₁ ==>[ id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f ] gg₁
      := transportb
           (λ z, _ ==>[ z ] _)
           (id2_rwhisker _ _)
           (disp_id2 _).

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
ξ •• ζ =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
   id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp xx₂))

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
ξ •• ζ =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
   id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp xx₂))

D: disp_bicat B

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
   id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
  (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
      id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
     (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x)) (ξ •• ζ)) =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
   id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp xx₂))

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁

  first_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
   id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
  (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
      id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
     (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x)) (ξ •• ζ)) =

   id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)

D: disp_bicat B

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
       id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
      (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x)) (ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
•• help_inv_cell₂

  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
       id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
      (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x)) (ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
•• help_inv_cell₂
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
       id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
      (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x)) (ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• transportf
        (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)
                 (id₁ x · f),
         disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂)
           gg₁) first_lift_path
        (vcomp_disp_invertible
           (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
           (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))) =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))
•• help_inv_cell₂

transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,

  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @

?b =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy

l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁)) = ?t2

          exact (transportf_disp_invertible_2cell first_lift_path _).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
       id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
      (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x)) (ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• transportf
        (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)
        (vcomp_disp_invertible
           (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
           (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))) =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))
•• help_inv_cell₂

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

  HB_2_1

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift

transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
       id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
      (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x)) (ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• transportf
        (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)
        (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path

     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂)
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x)))
     ((ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• transportf
        (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)
        (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
        (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
           (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))))
     (((ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
      •• transportf
           (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
            id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
           (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)
           (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))) =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))
•• help_inv_cell₂

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
        (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
           (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
            ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x))
             ▹ f) • h)
           (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
        (((ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
         •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))
•• help_inv_cell₂

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (((ξ •• ζ) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))
•• help_inv_cell₂

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y

l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂)
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ζ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))

•• help_inv_cell₂ =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (((ξ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ζ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))

?b =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @

   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (((ξ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ζ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))

              (id₁ x · f)))

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift

w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift

ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) (id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂) gg₁)
  first_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
     (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁)) = ?y'

          exact (transportf_disp_invertible_2cell first_lift_path _).

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (comp_of_invertible_2cell

              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift

  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift

  (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)
  (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
•• help_inv_cell₂ =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (((ξ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ζ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (((ξ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ζ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))

  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift

  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (((ξ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ζ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) = ?b
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
?b =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B

δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (((ξ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ζ ▹▹ ff₂))
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) = ?b

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
((ξ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (ζ ▹▹ ff₂))
•• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁

  first_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
(ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
•• ((ζ ▹▹ ff₂)
    •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
