B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[
         id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)] gg₁,
   (w₁ ▹▹ ff₂) •• z)
  (! transportf_disp_invertible_2cell
       first_lift_path
       (vcomp_disp_invertible
          (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
          (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))) @
eq_lift_2cell_alt D ff₂ w₁: (w₁ ▹▹ ff₂)
•• transportf
     (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)
     (vcomp_disp_invertible
        (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
        (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁)) =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   second_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ second_lift
   •• help_cell₁)
(ζ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) =
?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[
         id₂ (id₁ x · f)] gg₁, 
   (w₁ ▹▹ ff₂) •• z)
  (! transportf_disp_invertible_2cell
       first_lift_path
       (vcomp_disp_invertible
          (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff₂)
          (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₁))) @
eq_lift_2cell_alt D ff₂ w₁: (w₁ ▹▹ ff₂)
•• transportf
     (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)
     (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ z : invertible_2cell 
              (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
              (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
      disp_invertible_2cell z (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
     second_lift_path
     (vcomp_disp_invertible
        (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
        (vcomp_disp_invertible
           (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
           (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
              (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))
   •• help_cell₁)
(ζ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) =
?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
p: transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((w₁ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ z : invertible_2cell 
              (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
              (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
      disp_invertible_2cell z (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
     second_lift_path
     (vcomp_disp_invertible
        (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
        (vcomp_disp_invertible
           (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
           (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
              (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))
   •• help_cell₁)
(ζ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) =
?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
p: transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((w₁ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ z : invertible_2cell 
              (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
              (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
      disp_invertible_2cell z (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
     second_lift_path
     (vcomp_disp_invertible
        (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
        (vcomp_disp_invertible
           (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
           (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
              (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))
   •• help_cell₁)
p':= transportb_transpose_right p: (w₁ ▹▹ ff₂)
•• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) =
transportb
  (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  (transportb
     (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
     (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (transportf
        (λ z : invertible_2cell
                 (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
                 (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
         disp_invertible_2cell z 
           (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂) second_lift_path
        (vcomp_disp_invertible
           (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l
              ff₂)
           (vcomp_disp_invertible
              (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r
                 δl)
              (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
                 (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell
                    γ₂)))) •• help_cell₁))
(ζ ▹▹ ff₂) •• (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) =
?t2

          exact p'.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
     (vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
        (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
        (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
      •• transportb
           (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
            r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
               (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
              (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
           (transportb
              (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
               r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
              (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
               ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
              (transportf
                 (λ z : invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
                          (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
                  disp_invertible_2cell z
                    (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
                 second_lift_path
                 (vcomp_disp_invertible
                    (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                       r l ff₂)
                    (vcomp_disp_invertible
                       (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                          r δl)
                       (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
                          (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell
                             γ₂)))) •• help_cell₁)))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
     (! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
          (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
          (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
      •• transportf
           (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
            r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
           (! maponpaths
                (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
                 (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
                (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
           (transportf
              (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
               r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
              (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
                  ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)))
              (transportf
                 (λ z : invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
                          (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
                  disp_invertible_2cell z
                    (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
                 second_lift_path
                 (vcomp_disp_invertible
                    (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                       r l ff₂)
                    (vcomp_disp_invertible
                       (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                          r δl)
                       (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
                          (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell
                             γ₂)))) •• help_cell₁)))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
     (! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
          (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
          (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
            (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
           (! maponpaths
                (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
                 (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
                (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)))
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
            id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
               (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
              (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
                  ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))))
           ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
            •• (transportf
                  (λ z : invertible_2cell
                           (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
                           (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
                   disp_invertible_2cell z
                     (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
                  second_lift_path
                  (vcomp_disp_invertible
                     (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                        r l ff₂)
                     (vcomp_disp_invertible
                        (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                           r δl)
                        (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
                           (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell
                              γ₂)))) •• help_cell₁))))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (transportf
         (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
                  (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
          disp_invertible_2cell z (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
         second_lift_path
         (vcomp_disp_invertible
            (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
            (vcomp_disp_invertible
               (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
               (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
                  (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))
       •• help_cell₁)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (transportf
         (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
                  (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
          disp_invertible_2cell z (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
         second_lift_path
         (vcomp_disp_invertible
            (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
            (vcomp_disp_invertible
               (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
               (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
                  (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))
       •• help_cell₁)) = ?b
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
?b =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (transportf
         (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
                  (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
          disp_invertible_2cell z (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
         second_lift_path
         (vcomp_disp_invertible
            (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
            (vcomp_disp_invertible
               (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
               (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
                  (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))
       •• help_cell₁)) = ?b

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
           (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
  second_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
     (vcomp_disp_invertible
        (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
        (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
           (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))
•• help_cell₁ = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : invertible_2cell (id₁ x · id₁ x · f)
           (id₁ x · id₁ x · f),
   disp_invertible_2cell z (r ;; l ;; ff₂) gg₂)
  second_lift_path
  (vcomp_disp_invertible
     (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
     (vcomp_disp_invertible
        (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
        (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
           (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂)))) =
?y'

          exact (transportf_disp_invertible_2cell second_lift_path _).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (transportf
         (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
          r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₂)
         (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)
         (vcomp_disp_invertible
            (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l ff₂)
            (vcomp_disp_invertible
               (disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker r δl)
               (vcomp_disp_invertible δr
                  (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell γ₂))))
       •• help_cell₁)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• (transportf
         (λ z : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
          r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₂)
         (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)
         (disp_rassociator r l ff₂
          •• ((r ◃◃ δl) •• (δr •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))
       •• help_cell₁)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• transportf
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         r ;; l ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                  id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
            h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
           (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path))
        ((disp_rassociator r l ff₂
          •• ((r ◃◃ δl) •• (δr •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))
         •• help_cell₁)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                  id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
            h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
           (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)))
     ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
      •• ((disp_rassociator r l ff₂
           •• ((r ◃◃ δl) •• (δr •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))
          •• help_cell₁))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift

transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))

   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((ξ ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• ((disp_rassociator r l ff₂
        •• ((r ◃◃ δl) •• (δr •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)))
       •• help_cell₁)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  ((disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)
   •• help_inv_cell₂)

D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  HB_2_1

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift

ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)

        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
