δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
(disp_inv_cell γ₁ •• γ₁) •• disp_inv_cell γ₂ = ?t20

            
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
disp_inv_cell γ₁ •• γ₁ = ?y'

            exact (disp_vcomp_linv γ₁).
          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
  (vassocr (linvunitor f)
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
              (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
  (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff₂ ==>[ α] ff₂)
     (vcomp_linv
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))
     (disp_id2 ff₂) •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)
•• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
  (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
  (transportf (λ α : f ==> f, ff₂ ==>[ α] ff₂)
     (! vcomp_linv
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))
     (disp_id2 ff₂) •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)
•• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : f ==> f,
            h
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x · f)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
           (! vcomp_linv
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))))
     ((disp_id2 ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)
      •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁))) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
  ((disp_id2 ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)
   •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))

         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell

                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
  ((disp_id2 ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂)
   •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) = ?b

w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
disp_id2 ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₂ = ?y'

            apply disp_id2_left.
          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₂)
     (id2_left
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) (disp_inv_cell γ₂)
   •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) = ?t2

                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
  (disp_inv_cell γ₂ •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) = 
?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
disp_inv_cell γ₂ •• (γ₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) = ?t2

D: disp_bicat B

  HB_2_1

disp_inv_cell γ₂ •• γ₂ = ?y'

            exact (disp_vcomp_linv γ₂).
          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff₂ ==>[ α] ff₂)
  (vcomp_linv
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
              (id₁ x) f)))) (disp_id2 ff₂)
•• disp_inv_cell γ₁ = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf (λ α : f ==> f, ff₂ ==>[ α] ff₂)
  (! vcomp_linv
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f)))) (disp_id2 ff₂)
•• disp_inv_cell γ₁ = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
     (! vcomp_linv
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))))
  (disp_id2 ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
disp_id2 ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁ = ?t2

          apply disp_id2_left.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
       • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
     help_cell₁_subproof @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                 id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
           (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
        • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
           • (lunitor f
              • ((linvunitor f
                  • linvunitor (id₁ x · f))
                 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
     (vassocl (lunitor f)
        (linvunitor f
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x · f)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (disp_lunitor ff₂
      •• transportf
           (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
              (! id2_left
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : f ==> f,
                  h
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                f)
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (... · f)))
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
                 (! vcomp_linv
                      (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            f)))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
              (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
           (transportb
              (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
              (vassocr
                 (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1
                 (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)))
                 (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                 ^-1)
              (transportf
                 (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f,
                  ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ h : f ==> f,
                     h
                     • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)) ^-1)
                    (! vcomp_linv
                         (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                     f)
                                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                     (id₁ x · f)))
                               (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                  (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)))))
                 (transportb
                    (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · f,
                     ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
                    (id2_left
                       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)) ^-1)
                    (disp_inv_cell γ₁)))))) =
transportf
  (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
  (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
       (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂
   •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁ •• help_inv_cell₂))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
       • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
     help_cell₁_subproof @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                 id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
           (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
        • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
           • (lunitor f
              • ((linvunitor f
                  • linvunitor (id₁ x · f))
                 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
     (! vassocl (lunitor f)
          (linvunitor f
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
              • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            f)
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x · f)))
                      (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (disp_lunitor ff₂
      •• transportf
           (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
              (! id2_left
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : f ==> f,
                  h
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                f)
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (... · f)))
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
                 (! vcomp_linv
                      (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            f)))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
              (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
           (transportf
              (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
              (! vassocr
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)))
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                   ^-1)
              (transportf
                 (λ x0 : f ==> id₁ x · f,
                  ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ h : f ==> f,
                     h
                     • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)) ^-1)
                    (! vcomp_linv
                         (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                     f)
                                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                     (id₁ x · f)))
                               (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                  (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)))))
                 (transportf
                    (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · f,
                     ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
                    (! id2_left
                         (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)) ^-1)
                    (disp_inv_cell γ₁)))))) =
transportf
  (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
  (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
       (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂
   •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁ •• help_inv_cell₂))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
       • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
     help_cell₁_subproof @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                 id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
           (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
        • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
           • (lunitor f
              • ((linvunitor f
                  • linvunitor (id₁ x · f))
                 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id₂ (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
     (! vassocl (lunitor f)
          (linvunitor f
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
              • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            f)
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x · f)))
                      (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
              (! id2_left
                   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               f)
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (id₁ x · f)))
                         (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                            (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : f ==> f,
                  h
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                f)
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (...)))
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
                 (! vcomp_linv
                      (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            f)))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
               h
               • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             f)
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (id₁ x · f)))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))
                  • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
                    ^-1))
