                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
                    (id₁ x) 
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! id2_left
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) 
                      (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
                    (id₁ x) 
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : f ==> f,
            h
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (...)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) 
                       (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
           (! vcomp_linv
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
                    (id₁ x) 
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) 
                      (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f)
       (linvunitor f
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) 
                      (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
                (id₁ x) 
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
                 (id₁ x) 
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocl (lunitor f) 
          (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) 
                      (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
                 (id₁ x) 
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
       • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
     help_cell₁_subproof @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                 id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
           (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
        • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
           • (lunitor f
              • ((linvunitor f • linvunitor ...)
                 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor ... ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : ... · f ==> ... · f, (... ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths (λ h : ... ==> ..., h • id₂ ...)
     (maponpaths (λ ..., ...) (linvunitor_lunitor ...)) @
   id2_right (id₂ ... ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (id₂ ... ▹ f))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         linvunitor f • h) (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
       (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂
   •• (disp_inv_cell γ₁ •• disp_id2 gg₁)) = ?b

          
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
disp_inv_cell γ₁ •• disp_id2 gg₁ = ?t2

          apply disp_id2_right.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         linvunitor f • h) (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
       (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂
   •• transportb
        (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
        (id2_right (linvunitor f)) (disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! id2_left
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! vassocr
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! id2_left
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : f ==> f,
            h
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (...)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
           (! vcomp_linv
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f)
       (linvunitor f
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
       • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
     help_cell₁_subproof @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                 id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
           (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
        • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
           • (lunitor f
              • ((linvunitor f • linvunitor ...)
                 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor ... ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : ... · f ==> ... · f, (... ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths (λ h : ... ==> ..., h • id₂ ...)
     (maponpaths (λ ..., ...) (linvunitor_lunitor ...)) @
   id2_right (id₂ ... ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (id₂ ... ▹ f))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         linvunitor f • h) (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
       (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂
   •• transportf
        (λ α : f ==> id₁ x · f, ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
        (! id2_right (linvunitor f))
        (disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! id2_left
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! vassocr
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! id2_left
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : f ==> f,
            h
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (...)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
           (! vcomp_linv
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f)
       (linvunitor f
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
       • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
     help_cell₁_subproof @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                 id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
           (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
        • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
           • (lunitor f
              • ((linvunitor f • linvunitor ...)
                 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor ... ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : ... · f ==> ... · f, (... ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths (λ h : ... ==> ..., h • id₂ ...)
     (maponpaths (λ ..., ...) (linvunitor_lunitor ...)) @
   id2_right (id₂ ... ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (id₂ ... ▹ f))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         linvunitor f • h) (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
       (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
        (! id2_right (linvunitor f)))
     (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! id2_left
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! vassocr
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! id2_left
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : f ==> f,
            h
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (...)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
           (! vcomp_linv
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f)
       (linvunitor f
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
       • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
     help_cell₁_subproof @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                 id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
           (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
        • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
           • (lunitor f
              • ((linvunitor f • linvunitor ...)
                 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor ... ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : ... · f ==> ... · f, (... ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths (λ h : ... ==> ..., h • id₂ ...)
     (maponpaths (λ ..., ...) (linvunitor_lunitor ...)) @
   id2_right (id₂ ... ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (id₂ ... ▹ f))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! id2_right (linvunitor f)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         linvunitor f • h) (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
       (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! id2_left
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (! vassocr
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f)))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! id2_left
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : f ==> f,
            h
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (...)))
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
           (! vcomp_linv
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))
            • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
        (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor f)
       (linvunitor f
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (id₁ x · f)))
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
        help_cell₂_subproof) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
       • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
     help_cell₁_subproof @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
         h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==>
                 id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
           (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
        • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
           • (lunitor f
              • ((linvunitor f • linvunitor ...)
                 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
         h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
        (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
         ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
     (! maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
           (lunitor ... ▹ f) • h)
          (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
   ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
       (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
     (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
        (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : ... · f ==> ... · f, (... ▹ f) • h)
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
   maponpaths (λ h : ... ==> ..., h • id₂ ...)
     (maponpaths (λ ..., ...) (linvunitor_lunitor ...)) @
   id2_right (id₂ ... ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (id₂ ... ▹ f))
  (disp_lunitor ff₂ •• disp_inv_cell γ₁)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
  (! id2_right (linvunitor f)) @
maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f, linvunitor f • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f)) @
! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   h • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) =
maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
  (! id2_left
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1)
     (! vcomp_linv
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))))) @
maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
  (! vassocr
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f))) ^-1
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (id₁ x · f)))
             (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                (id₁ x) f)))
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
maponpaths (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · f, lunitor f • h)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! id2_left
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : f ==> f,
         h
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ x · f)))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                    (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ x · f)))
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                 (id₁ x) f))
         • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
     (! vassocr (linvunitor f)
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
! vassocl (lunitor f)
    (linvunitor f
     • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1))
    (inv_of_invertible_2cell
       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
          (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
             (id₁ x) f))
     • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   h
   • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
              (id₁ x) f))
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
  (! vassocl (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (id₁ x · f)))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
                   (id₁ x) f))) ^-1)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   h
   • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)
              (id₁ x) f))
      • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) ^-1))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      (lunitor f • linvunitor f) • h)
     help_cell₂_subproof) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   ((lunitor f • linvunitor f)
    • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)) • h)
  help_cell₁_subproof @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (! (id2_right (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
   h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (! maponpaths
       (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
        (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
       (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
! vassocr (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
    (rassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
     • ((id₁ x ◃ lunitor f)
        • (lunitor f
           • ((linvunitor f • linvunitor (... · f))
              • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))))
    (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · id₁ x · f,
      h • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))
     (maponpaths pr1 second_lift_path)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
  (! (id2_right (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
  (! maponpaths
       (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
        (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) • h)
       (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path)) @
! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f)
    (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) (lunitor f • linvunitor f) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   h • (lunitor f • linvunitor f))
  (rwhisker_vcomp f (linvunitor (id₁ x))
     (lunitor (id₁ x))) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   ((... • ...) ▹ f) • h)
  (maponpaths pr1 first_lift_path) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f, h • id₂ (... · f))
  (maponpaths (λ x0 : ... ==> ..., x0 ▹ f)
     (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f)

        apply cellset_property.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
       id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
      (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))
      (transportb
         (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
          id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
         (vcomp_linv
            (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))
         (disp_id2 (id_disp xx₂))) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
•• help_inv_cell₂
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ z] gg₁)
  (id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((transportf
      (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
       id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
      (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))
      (transportb
         (λ z : id₁ x ==> id₁ x,
          id_disp xx₂ ==>[ z] id_disp xx₂)
         (vcomp_linv
            (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))
         (disp_id2 (id_disp xx₂))) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift) =
disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
•• transportb
     (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f, gg₁ ==>[ z] gg₁)
     (id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f) (disp_id2 gg₁)

  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)

  (λ z : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,

     (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂)
