         id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[

   •• disp_id2 gg₁)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  ((disp_id2 (id_disp xx₂) ▹▹ ff₂)
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
   •• disp_id2 gg₁)

        
B: bicat

  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell

     (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy

  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))

        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂)
     (id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f)
     (disp_id2 (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂))
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift) =

  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,

     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂)
   •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift
   •• disp_id2 gg₁)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
     (id2_left (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f))
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
     (id2_right (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift))

  HB_2_1

              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂

  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁

  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ x0 : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ x0] gg₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (transportf

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
transportf
  (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id_disp xx₂ ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
  (! id2_left (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (! vcomp_linv
             (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
     (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
        (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
   id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
   ! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift) =
transportf
  (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   first_lift ;; ff₂ ==>[ α] gg₁)
  (! id2_right (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
      id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
     (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f))
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor D ff₂ first_lift)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
! id2_left (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
  (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
  (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
     (! vcomp_linv
          (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)))) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   h • id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f))
  (maponpaths (λ x0 : id₁ x ==> id₁ x, x0 ▹ f)
     (linvunitor_lunitor (id₁ x))) @
id2_right (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) @
! id2_left (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) =
! id2_right (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
   id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f) • h)
  (! id2_rwhisker (id₁ x) f)

        apply cellset_property.
    Qed.

    Definition disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv_is_invertible
      : is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor _) ζ
      := ξ
         ,,
         disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_inv₁
         ,,
         disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_inv₂.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)) (r ;; l)
  (id_disp xx₂)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)) (r ;; l)
  (id_disp xx₂)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
δl:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₁ Hff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (l ;; ff₂) ff₁
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
δr:= map_between_cartesian_1cell_commute ff₂ Hff₁: disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell f) 
  (r ;; ff₁) ff₂
gg₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · f] yy
γ₁:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)) gg₁ ff₂
gg₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x · id₁ x · f] yy
γ₂:= transport_along_inv_2cell_disp_invertible_2cell
  HB_2_1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x · f)))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
        (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)) ff₂: disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ x · f)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f))) gg₂ ff₂
w₁:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x · id₁ x) 
  (id₁ x) gg₂ gg₁ (lunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₁
  second_lift first_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₁ second_lift
  first_lift
ζ:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
w₂:= pr2 Hff₂ x xx₂ (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) gg₁ gg₂
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift: lift_2cell_factor D ff₂ help_cell₂ first_lift
  second_lift
ξ:= inv_of_disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv: id_disp xx₂ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] r ;; l
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)) ζ

      apply disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv_is_invertible.
    Defined.
  End InverseOfCartesians.

  Section DispAdjEquivBetweenCartesians.
    Context {x y : B}
            {f : x --> y}
            {xx₁ xx₂ : D x}
            {yy : D y}
            {ff₁ : xx₁ -->[ f ] yy}
            (Hff₁ : cartesian_1cell D ff₁)
            {ff₂ : xx₂ -->[ f ] yy}
            (Hff₂ : cartesian_1cell D ff₂).

    Let l : xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
      := map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂.
    Let r : xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
      := map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r

      exact (pr1 (inverse_of_disp_invertible_2cell
                    (disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv_2cell Hff₂ Hff₁))).
    Defined.

    Let η : id_disp _ ==>[ linvunitor _ ] l ;; r
      := disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (id₁ x)) η

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (id₁ x)) η

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
inv_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell (id₁ x)) =
is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (id₁ x)

      apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
    Defined.

    Local Definition disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit
      : r ;; l ==>[ lunitor _ ] id_disp _
      := disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv Hff₁ Hff₂.

    Let ε : r ;; l ==>[ lunitor _ ] id_disp _
      := disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit.

    Local Definition disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit_invertible
      : is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)) ε
      := disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_inv_is_invertible Hff₁ Hff₂.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
∑ e : left_adjoint_equivalence (id₁ x),
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence e l

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y

ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
∑ e : left_adjoint_equivalence (id₁ x),
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence e l

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy

ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
left_equivalence (id₁ x)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy

ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
disp_left_equivalence ?Hf l

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
left_equivalence (id₁ x)
 exact (left_equivalence_of_left_adjoint_equivalence
                 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)).
      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁

ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
disp_left_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) l
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
     (r,, η,, ε))
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
     (r,, η,, ε))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
     (r,, η,, ε))
 exact disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit_invertible.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx₁, xx₂: D x
yy: D y
ff₁: xx₁ -->[ f] yy
Hff₁: cartesian_1cell D ff₁
ff₂: xx₂ -->[ f] yy
Hff₂: cartesian_1cell D ff₂
l:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₁ Hff₂: xx₁ -->[ id₁ x] xx₂
r:= map_between_cartesian_1cell ff₂ Hff₁: xx₂ -->[ id₁ x] xx₁
η:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_unit: id_disp xx₁ ==>[ linvunitor (id₁ x)] l ;; r
ε:= disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit: r ;; l ==>[ lunitor (id₁ x)] id_disp xx₂
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
     (r,, η,, ε))
 exact disp_adj_equiv_between_cartesian_1cell_counit_invertible.
